focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Finn searches for Poe near a crashed TIE fighter, escapes as it sinks into the sand, and witnesses a massive explosion, leaving him disoriented, scared, and alone in the desert.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Finn wakes in the desert, searches for Poe near a crashed TIE fighter, retrieves only Poe's jacket, and flees as the ship sinks and explodes, leaving him alone and disoriented.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: trying to save Poe
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: alone, scared, and directionless
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: grief and uncertainty about his next move
evidence_quotes: His EYES OPEN. He goes from unconscious to terrified, fast.
He gets up -- moves toward it, calling out: FINN Poe! Poe!
He thinks he sees POE'S ARM -- he pulls on it, but it's JUST POE'S JACKET.

relation_updates: believes Poe is dead
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I pulled on that jacket and realized he was gone—I was alone.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Finn, Rey, and BB-8 flee through a tent maze, evading stormtroopers who call for an air strike as they narrowly escape blasts and disappear into another tent.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: fleeing with Rey and BB-8 under pursuit
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Finn takes Rey's hand during escape to guide or protect her, but she resists and pulls away, asserting her ability to keep up on her own.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: evade stormtroopers and survive
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Rey assumes the lead in the escape, with Finn following; cooperation continues under tension
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: tension between Finn's protective instinct and Rey's insistence on independence
evidence_quotes: Finn and Rey holding hands, the three race, ZIGZAGGING through a maze of tents
REY Let go of me!
REY (pulls her hand back) I know how to run without you holding my hand!
Now Finn and BB-8 follow Rey

relation_updates: Finn shows physical concern for Rey
Rey resists Finn's protective gesture
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I tried to hold her hand to keep her safe, but she didn't want it

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: BB-8 rolls to the ceiling as TIE fighters attack; Rey and Finn struggle to operate the ship, with Finn eventually firing back at the fighters.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: After struggling with the gun controls and exchanging tense dialogue with Rey, Finn successfully activates the targeting system and fires the Millennium Falcon's guns at enemy TIE fighters.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: repelling enemy attack
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Finn becomes an active participant in the ship's defense, having fired the guns in combat for the first time.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: ship remains vulnerable without full crew coordination
evidence_quotes: REY What are you doing back there? Are you ever gonna fire back?!
Finn flicks switches -- The GUN TARGETING LIGHTS UP
Finn finally FIRES BACK at the two TIE FIGHTERS!

relation_updates: tense but functional teamwork with Rey
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I'm not just running—I'm fighting back now

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Rey and Finn introduce themselves and work together to lift a grating as steam bursts below, while BB-8 watches with concern, reminding Finn of his earlier lie.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: establishes mutual recognition and cooperation between Finn and Rey
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Finn and Rey exchange names and share a moment of connection after surviving combat, beginning to form a partnership; Finn feels guilt when BB-8's look reminds him he has not been fully honest with Rey.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: survive and escape together
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Finn is now known to Rey as 'Finn' and is working alongside her, but has not revealed his full past or true role as a former stormtrooper
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Finn has not confessed that he lied about his background or his initial intentions
evidence_quotes: I don't know your name.
FINN Finn.
REY I'm Rey.
BB-8 looks at him: really? Finn is reminded: HE'S LIED TO HER.

relation_updates: forms initial bond with Rey
experiences guilt over deceiving Rey
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I told her my name was Finn, and she smiled like I mattered

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Han Solo reclaims the Millennium Falcon from Rey and Finn on Jakku, who reveal they stole it from Unkar Plutt. Rey and Finn recognize Han and Chewbacca, awed by the legendary ship.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Finn transitions from hiding from stormtroopers to confronting Han Solo aboard the Millennium Falcon, shifting from evasion to direct engagement with a key figure in the galactic conflict.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: escape Jakku and avoid First Order
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: aboard the Millennium Falcon with Rey and BB-8, now in the presence of Han Solo and Chewbacca
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: unclear if Han will help them reach the Resistance
evidence_quotes: Finn PULLS THE GRATING CLOSED as he says: FINN (CONT'D) Hurry!
REY I'm hurrying!
FINN Yeah. Their masks filter out smoke, not toxins.
You can understand that thing?

relation_updates: begins forming alliance with Han Solo
continues cooperative bond with Rey
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I helped Rey hide under the grating while the ship was boarded

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Rey and Finn encounter a Rathtar attacking Guavian and Kanjiklub members; Finn is captured by the creature and separated from Rey as they flee through the ship.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Finn is grabbed by a Rathtar and pulled away from Rey while fleeing through the cargo ship, becoming separated and isolated.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: escape the creature and reunite with Rey
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: captured and separated from Rey, in immediate physical danger
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether he will survive and be rescued from the Rathtar
evidence_quotes: They race around another corner -- a RATHTAR IS THERE!
Finn is GRABBED, PULLED AWAY FAST!
REY (CONT'D) FINN!
But the Rathtar's fast and TURNS A CORNER, losing Rey

relation_updates: separated from Rey in crisis
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I tried to lead us to safety—but now I'm alone and being dragged away

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Han retrieves blasters from a storage unit while Finn expresses concern about First Order sympathizers; Han dismisses his worries and comments on women uncovering the truth, leaving Finn guilt-ridden.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Finn falsely claims to be a high-ranking Resistance member to gain credibility, but feels immediate guilt when Han dismissively refers to him as 'big deal' and warns that women always uncover the truth.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: avoid exposure as a fraud
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: emotionally conflicted and dishonest about his past
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: fear of being discovered as a former stormtrooper with no Resistance ties
evidence_quotes: HAN Listen big deal, you've got another problem. Women always figure out the truth.
Finn watches him go, wracked with guilt.

relation_updates: strained trust with Han due to deception
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I'm not who they think I am

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Finn leaves to escape his past, breaking Rey's heart, but he looks back one last time; Rey, hearing a child's cry, turns away to help, unaware of his final gesture.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Maz identifies Finn's instinct to flee, prompting him to openly express his fear of the First Order and his belief that resistance is futile.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to escape and avoid further conflict
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Finn remains determined to run, despite being confronted about his fear
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether he will continue running or choose to stay and fight
evidence_quotes: There is no fight against the First Order! Not one we can win. Look around. There's no chance we haven't been recognized already.
Please, we came here for your help.

relation_updates: Maz sees through Finn's facade and identifies his fear
status_updates: Finn's past as a fugitive Stormtrooper becomes a visible tension
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I'm not a hero, I'm just trying to survive

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Finn and Poe reunite, embrace, and learn Finn saved BB-8 and completed Poe's mission; Poe gives Finn his jacket and offers help.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Finn reunites with Poe, who learns from BB-8 that Finn saved the droid and completed his mission, then tells Finn to keep his jacket and calls him a good man.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: seek help to rescue Rey
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: recognized and accepted by Poe as a trusted ally
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: still needs help to reach Rey
evidence_quotes: Poe looks up and sees Finn -- and he can't believe it either! Poe smiles, points at Finn.
They move to each other -- and embrace.
BB-8 says that you saved him.
You completed my mission, Finn.

relation_updates: bond reestablished with Poe
gains recognition from a respected pilot
status_updates: wears Poe's jacket as symbol of belonging
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Poe called me a good man—I have to be one

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Han, Finn, and Chewie trek through snow, evading walkers; Finn leads them toward a laser siphon draining the sun, revealing his lack of technical skills, frustrating Han.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: mission under pressure with revelation of true motives
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Finn admits he worked in sanitation on Starkiller Base and does not know how to disable the shields, revealing his only goal is to rescue Rey, which undermines Han's confidence in him.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: rescue Rey, not complete technical mission
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Finn's lack of technical knowledge is exposed, creating tension with Han and casting doubt on the group's plan to disable the shields.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The group must find a way to disable the shields without Finn having the necessary expertise.
evidence_quotes: FINN Sanitation.
HAN Sanitation? Then how do you know how to disable the shields?
FINN I don't. I'm just here to get Rey.
HAN People are counting on us! The galaxy is counting on us--!

relation_updates: strained trust with Han Solo due to mission misalignment
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I'm just here to get Rey.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Rey is moved when Chewie reveals Finn suggested returning for her; they share an emotional moment before Han urges them to escape immediately.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Finn's role in initiating the mission to rescue Rey is revealed, highlighting his personal investment in her safety and strengthening their emotional connection.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: rescue Rey and escape Starkiller Base
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Finn receives direct acknowledgment from Rey that his actions mattered, confirmed by her emotional reaction and gratitude.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: immediate danger of remaining on Starkiller Base
evidence_quotes: FINN We came back for you.
Chewie TALKS -- and Rey's eyes nearly tear up.
... That it was your idea.
They embrace.

relation_updates: stronger emotional connection with Rey
status_updates: recognized as the driving force behind the rescue
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I was the one who insisted on coming back for her

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Rey recovers, witnesses Finn's struggle against Kylo Ren, and instinctively calls Luke's lightsaber to her. She ignites it and launches a powerful attack, surprising Kylo with her raw skill.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Finn fights Kylo Ren with Luke's lightsaber, briefly gains the upper hand by landing a hit, but is overwhelmed, disarmed, and struck down.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: defends Rey and resists Kylo Ren despite fear
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: disarmed and critically injured, lying incapacitated in the snow
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: ability to survive after being struck by Kylo Ren's lightsaber
evidence_quotes: Finn TURNS ON LUKE'S LIGHTSABER -- upon seeing the weapon, Kylo Ren REACTS IN SHOCK.
And he ACTUALLY GETS A HIT IN! LUKE'S SABER GRAZING KYLO REN'S ARM!
That's when KYLO REN STRIKES: HE LANDS A BLOW TO FINN'S TORSO -- LUKE'S LIGHTSABER FLIES FROM FINN'S HAND, THROWN TWENTY FEET!
FINN Rey! Rey! Rey... Rey... Oh no. Oh no no no...

relation_updates: adversarial relationship with Kylo Ren established through combat
protective bond with Rey demonstrated in action
status_updates: gains temporary possession of Luke's lightsaber
suffers critical injury from Kylo Ren
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I stood up to Kylo Ren even though I was terrified

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: The timeline traces 12 key developments across the character's screenplay trajectory.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Han Solo reclaims the Millennium Falcon from Rey and Finn on Jakku, who reveal they stole it from Unkar Plutt. Rey and Finn recognize Han and Chewbacca, awed by the legendary ship.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: reclaiming ownership of the Millennium Falcon and reentering galactic conflict
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Han Solo reclaims the Millennium Falcon from Rey and Finn, asserting his authority as its rightful owner after learning it passed through multiple hands since being stolen from him.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to recover his ship and confirm its condition
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Han Solo regains control of the Millennium Falcon and resumes command, reengaging with key figures involved in the growing conflict.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: the growing threat of the First Order and the mystery of Luke Skywalker's disappearance
evidence_quotes: HAN Chewie, we're home.
Who stole it from me! Well, you tell him Han Solo just stole back the Millennium Falcon for good.
Han walks away, takes in the ship: it's his again.
REY This is the Millennium Falcon? You're Han Solo? CONTINUED: HAN I used to be.

relation_updates: establishes initial wary dynamic with Rey and Finn
reaffirms deep bond with Chewbacca
status_updates: regains possession of the Millennium Falcon
returns to active involvement in larger galactic events
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I used to be Han Solo—but now I’m back.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 102、INT. CARGO SHIP - BELOW FLOOR GRATING - DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Han and Chewie witness chaos as Rathtars attack both gangs, causing panic and shifting focus from capturing the droid to survival amid blaster fire and screams.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Han faces armed demands from both the Guavian Death Gang and Kanjiklub, realizing his past evasions have caught up to him and his usual charm is ineffective.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: appeal to past reliability to delay violence
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Han's confidence visibly falters as both gangs reject his excuses and move to confront him
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether Han's promises will be enough to prevent immediate violence
evidence_quotes: How long've we known each other?
Have I ever not delivered for you before?
Yeah.
Twice!

relation_updates: hostile relationship with Kanjiklub confirmed
credibility undermined by Bala-Tik and Tasu Leech
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Have I ever not delivered for you before?

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Han, Finn, and Rey rush into the Falcon's hangar; Han helps injured Chewie aboard, instructs Rey to close the door, and Finn assists Chewie as he screams in pain.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Han helps injured Chewie onto the Falcon and assigns Rey and Finn to critical tasks, showing reliance on them in a high-pressure moment.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: safely board and launch the Millennium Falcon
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: enters the Falcon with crew aboard, preparing for immediate escape
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Chewie's injury remains untreated
evidence_quotes: Han helps WOUNDED CHEWIE up the ramp,
HAN You, close the door behind us!
(TO FINN) You take care of Chewie!
Han and Rey race up the ramp as Finn heads up with Chewie, who SCREAMS WILDLY IN PAIN!

relation_updates: begins trusting Rey and Finn with responsibilities
demonstrates deep loyalty to Chewie
status_updates: enters the Falcon with team intact
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I got you, Chewie — just like always

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Han confirms the Force and Jedi are real, reveals Luke's exile after his apprentice's betrayal, and agrees to help deliver BB-8 to an old friend for safe passage.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Han confirms the reality of the Force and Jedi, reveals Luke’s exile after his apprentice's betrayal, and agrees to help deliver BB-8 to an old friend.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: agrees to help Rey and Finn by taking BB-8 to an old friend
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Han shifts from passive observer to active participant in the mission, committing to assist Rey, Finn, and BB-8 despite initial skepticism.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Luke's fate and the incomplete map

relation_updates: extends trust to Rey and Finn
affirms loyalty to Luke and the Resistance cause
status_updates: becomes actively involved in the mission
auxiliary.persona_anchor: The Force is real—I didn't believe it once, but I do now.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Rey hesitates to accept Han's job offer due to her commitment to return home to Jakku, despite mutual interest and Chewie's approval.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Han offers Rey a position as second mate on the Millennium Falcon, indicating he sees her as capable and trustworthy.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: seeking crew to help with the Falcon
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Rey declines the offer due to her commitment to return to Jakku
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Rey's obligation to return to Jakku conflicts with the opportunity to join Han's crew
evidence_quotes: REY If you were, I'd be flattered. But I have to get home.
REY (BEAT) I've already been away too long.

relation_updates: Han initiates professional interest in Rey
status_updates: Han in possession of blaster pistol (prior to handing it over)
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I've been thinkin' about bringing on some more crew

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Han, Finn, and Chewie are captured by Stormtroopers and disarmed, but the Resistance arrives with X-Wings attacking, giving them hope as a black-marked X-Wing destroys TIE Fighters.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Han Solo intervenes in a firefight to shoot a Stormtrooper who is about to kill Finn, then helps Finn to his feet.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: survive and resist capture
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Han, Finn, and Chewie are temporarily captured but regain freedom when Resistance forces arrive and engage the First Order.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Rey has been taken by Kylo Ren
evidence_quotes: The Stormtrooper is about to end him, when THE STORMTROOPER IS SHOT AND FALLS! Wide-eyed Finn sees Han run over, having fired the blast!
Han helps him up.
HAN You okay, Big deal?

relation_updates: Finn now trusts Han as a protector
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I shot that stormtrooper before he could kill Finn

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Han and Leia reunite, exchanging subtle remarks; Chewie greets Leia before boarding. Han reveals he saw their son, Kylo Ren, a moment observed by Maz.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Han reunites with Leia after years apart and tells her he saw their son Kylo Ren, acknowledging his presence at the conflict site.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to reconnect with Leia and share the painful truth about Ben
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Han openly acknowledges having seen Kylo Ren, ending his silence on the matter
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether Kylo Ren can be redeemed
evidence_quotes: A silent beat, husband and wife reunited for the first time in years. In the smoke and embers, no one says a word.
HAN You changed your hair.
LEIA Same jacket.
HAN No, new jacket.

relation_updates: reconnection with Leia after years of separation
shared acknowledgment of their son's fall
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I saw our son. He was here.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Leia and Han mourn their son, blaming Snoke for turning him to the dark side; Leia believes they can still save him, emphasizing Han's role as his father.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: emotional confrontation and shift in understanding
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Han begins to accept Leia's belief that Snoke turned their son and considers his responsibility as a father in trying to reach Ben.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to come to terms with his son's fall and consider reconciliation
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Han shifts from resignation about Ben being lost to openness about the possibility of saving him
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether he has the strength to confront his son
evidence_quotes: HAN There was nothing we could've done. (hard for him to say) There was too much Vader in him.
HAN If Luke couldn't reach him, how could I?
LEIA Luke is a Jedi... you're his father. There's still light in him. I know it.

relation_updates: shift from mutual blame to shared hope for their son
auxiliary.persona_anchor: We lost our son, forever—but maybe not.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Han, Finn, and Chewie trek through snow, evading walkers; Finn leads them toward a laser siphon draining the sun, revealing his lack of technical skills, frustrating Han.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Han expresses frustration at Finn's lack of technical knowledge and the absence of a plan to disable the shields, but continues forward with the mission.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: disable shields and rescue Rey
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: the team moves toward the objective despite uncertainty and lack of a clear plan
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: no clear method to disable the shields
evidence_quotes: HAN What was your job when you were based here?
HAN Sanitation? Then how do you know how to disable the shields?
HAN People are counting on us! The galaxy is counting on us--!
FINN I don't. I'm just here to get Rey.

relation_updates: growing tension with Finn over competence
continued reliance on Chewbacca
status_updates: on foot at Starkiller Base in hostile environment
auxiliary.persona_anchor: People are counting on us! The galaxy is counting on us--!

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 202、INT. STARKILLER BASE - CONTROL ACCESS POINT - DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Phasma warns Finn of incoming troops; Han suggests disposing of her in a garbage chute, which Finn confirms exists.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Han proposes using a garbage chute to dispose of Captain Phasma, prioritizing speed and security in escaping the base.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: eliminate threat from captured enemy while securing escape route
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: shields are disabled and Phasma is contained; the group prepares to extract Rey
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: how to escape before reinforcements arrive
evidence_quotes: Finn, Han and Chewie, blasters aimed.
HAN Don't worry kid, we won't leave here without her.
HAN Is there a garbage chute? Trash compactor?
CAPTAIN PHASMA (to Finn, cruel) You can't be so stupid as to think this will be easy. My troops will storm this block and kill you all.

relation_updates: reinforces leadership role with Finn
status_updates: immediate danger of troop arrival confirmed
auxiliary.persona_anchor: when the job's done, don't stick around for thanks

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Rey is moved when Chewie reveals Finn suggested returning for her; they share an emotional moment before Han urges them to escape immediately.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Han interrupts the emotional reunion to urge immediate escape, redirecting the group's focus to survival.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: prioritize immediate escape
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Han reasserts practical leadership in a high-pressure situation, emphasizing mission over emotion.
evidence_quotes: HAN Are you all right?
REY Yeah.
HAN Good.
HAN Escape now. Hug later.

relation_updates: reinforces protective role toward Rey and Finn
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Escape now. Hug later.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Han confronts Kylo Ren, urging him to remove his mask and rejecting Snoke's influence, while Finn, Rey, and Chewie watch from different levels as sunlight illuminates the confrontation.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: father confronting his son Kylo Ren during a critical mission
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Han Solo confronts Kylo Ren, calls him by his birth name Ben, and urges him to remove his mask in a direct emotional appeal.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: reconnect with his son and convince him to reject Snoke's influence
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Han is exposed on the catwalk, emotionally engaged with Kylo Ren, and physically vulnerable
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Kylo Ren's response to Han's appeal remains uncertain, and Han's safety is at immediate risk
evidence_quotes: He calls out, strongly: HAN Ben!
Take off that mask. You don't need it.
The face of my son.
That's what Snoke wants you to believe but it's not true. My son is alive.

relation_updates: direct father-son confrontation revealed
emotional appeal to Ben over Kylo Ren
status_updates: engaged in verbal standoff with Kylo Ren
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Ben… that’s my son. I can still reach him

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: The timeline traces 12 key developments across the character's screenplay trajectory.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Rey slides down a sand dune, rides her speeder across the salt flats past scattered debris, and drives off into the distance.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: introduction of Rey's isolated, resource-scarce existence
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Rey is shown performing a daily survival ritual in a desolate environment, extracting the last drops from her canteen and descending from the wreckage of a Star Destroyer to begin scavenging.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: survival through scavenging
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Rey departs on her speeder across the salt flats to continue her scavenging routine, emphasizing physical isolation and environmental harshness.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: longing for connection and escape from Jakku
evidence_quotes: She opens her canteen, shakes out the two final drops into her mouth.
HITS THE SIDE of the canteen again and again for whatever she can get.
She sets her things on a piece of sheet metal and sits next to it, sliding down the sand dune.
Rey moves to her junker SPEEDER, jumps on, fires the sputtery engine and DRIVES OFF.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: I shake the canteen until there's nothing left—just like every day.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Rey refuses to sell BB-8 despite hunger and Unkar's offer; Unkar, angered, orders his men to follow her and seize the droid.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Rey refuses Unkar Plutt's offer to buy BB-8, prioritizing the droid's safety over a large quantity of food.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: protect BB-8
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: decides to keep BB-8 despite financial need, prompting Unkar to send men to seize the droid
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: imminent threat from Unkar's men who are ordered to follow and capture BB-8
evidence_quotes: Sixty portions.
Actually... the droid's not for sale.
Follow the girl and get that droid.
He SLAMS the service window door SHUT.

relation_updates: defies Unkar Plutt
solidifies bond with BB-8
auxiliary.persona_anchor: the droid's not for sale

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Rey pilots the Falcon while Finn mans the guns; they evade enemy tracking by flying low, with Rey stabilizing the ship after a risky maneuver.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Rey stabilizes the Millennium Falcon after a destabilizing maneuver and commits to flying low to evade enemy tracking.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: evade enemy tracking
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: successfully regains control of the Falcon and initiates low-altitude flight
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: fear of the next move
evidence_quotes: Rey pilots
FINN Stay low! It confuses their tracking!
Rey LETS GO OF THE YOKE, stretches to the co-pilot controls -- THE FALCON CANTS!
REY BB-8, hold on!

relation_updates: coordinates with Finn under fire
protects BB-8 during maneuver
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I'M GOING LOW!!!

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Rey and Finn introduce themselves and work together to lift a grating as steam bursts below, while BB-8 watches with concern, reminding Finn of his earlier lie.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: establishing connection with Finn and BB-8
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Rey shares a moment of mutual recognition and cooperation with Finn after combat, introduces herself by name, and reaffirms her commitment to help BB-8 reach the Resistance despite Finn's earlier deception.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to cooperate with Finn and protect BB-8
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Rey moves from isolation toward tentative trust in Finn and active partnership in the mission.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Finn's false claim about being with the Resistance remains unaddressed.
evidence_quotes: You're ok. He's with the Resistance. He's going to get you home. We both will.
I don't know your name.
I'm Rey.

relation_updates: forms a bond with Finn
reassures BB-8 of her loyalty
status_updates: experiences positive social connection for the first time
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I'm Rey.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Han Solo reclaims the Millennium Falcon from Rey and Finn on Jakku, who reveal they stole it from Unkar Plutt. Rey and Finn recognize Han and Chewbacca, awed by the legendary ship.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Rey declares herself as the Falcon's pilot to Han Solo, asserting her role despite being caught in hiding and under his armed scrutiny.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: survive confrontation and retain control of the Falcon
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: no longer in control of the Falcon
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether Han will accept her claim or dismiss her
evidence_quotes: The grating above LIFTS OFF -- hands in surrender, they look up at Han, who's training his blaster on them, threatening.
REY ...I'm the pilot...
REY No, it's true: we're the only ones on board.

relation_updates: first encounter with Han Solo establishes initial tension and awe
status_updates: exposed and disarmed after failed hiding attempt
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I'm the pilot

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Rey and Finn encounter a Rathtar attacking Guavian and Kanjiklub members; Finn is captured by the creature and separated from Rey as they flee through the ship.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Rey sees a Rathtar for the first time, reacts with shock, and flees with Finn until he is suddenly grabbed and pulled away by the creature.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: escape the ship safely with Finn
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: separated from Finn during a crisis while both are in immediate physical danger
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Finn's fate is unknown after being taken by the Rathtar
evidence_quotes: Another corner -- and GANG MEMBERS ARE BATTLING A HORRIBLE RATHTAR!
Rey COVERS HER MOUTH.
FINN They look like that.
Finn is GRABBED, PULLED AWAY FAST!

relation_updates: separation from Finn under threat
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I saw that monster and froze—then Finn was gone

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Rey hesitates to accept Han's job offer due to her commitment to return home to Jakku, despite mutual interest and Chewie's approval.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: resisting opportunity due to personal commitment
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Rey declines Han's job offer despite mutual interest, prioritizing her duty to return to Jakku.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: return home to Jakku
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: remains committed to returning to Jakku and waiting for her family
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: conflict between desire for belonging and loyalty to her past
evidence_quotes: Rey wants to say yes. But something stops her. A line she can't cross.
I have to get home.
I've already been away too long.

relation_updates: begins tentative connection with Han and Chewie
status_updates: offered crew position on the Millennium Falcon
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I have to get home. I've already been away too long.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Finn leaves to escape his past, breaking Rey's heart, but he looks back one last time; Rey, hearing a child's cry, turns away to help, unaware of his final gesture.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: emotional turning point in Rey's connection with Finn
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Finn confesses his past as a Stormtrooper and chooses to leave, rejecting Rey's plea to stay, which leaves her emotionally devastated but committed to the mission.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Rey wants Finn to stay and continue their mission together.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Rey is left alone at Maz's castle, emotionally broken but turns away to help a crying child, reaffirming her commitment to others over her personal pain.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Rey's emotional need for connection remains unfulfilled; Finn's future return is uncertain.
evidence_quotes: REY You can't just go. I won't let you.
Rey pleads silently as Finn prepares to leave, her heart breaking with his every step.
'Don't go,' she whispers, though words fail to change what must happen.
Rey turns toward the noise, following it into the castle, her grief momentarily set aside.

relation_updates: Finn departs, ending their partnership temporarily
Rey's emotional attachment to Finn is confirmed but unreciprocated in action
status_updates: reaffirms commitment to BB-8 and the Resistance
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I stayed behind when he left. I chose the mission over us.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Rey arrives to find Maz's castle under First Order attack, stormtroopers closing in; she disables her blaster's safety, fights back, hits two troopers, and flees with BB-8.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Rey overcomes a malfunctioning blaster by disabling the safety and returns fire on stormtroopers during an attack on Maz's castle.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: survive and escape First Order attack
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: evading stormtroopers after successfully firing back and hitting two enemies
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: pursued by First Order, separated from allies
evidence_quotes: Rey takes cover, grabs her BLASTER -- but IT WON'T FIRE!
SHE SWITCHES OFF THE SAFETY and FIRES BACK!
HITS TWO TROOPERS and retreats, calls to BB-8: BB-8 follows Rey AWAY FROM THE CASTLE, firing back at more chasing Troopers!

relation_updates: adversarial with First Order
cooperative with BB-8
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I saw the castle burning and had to fight back

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Rey evades approaching stormtroopers by climbing down a walkway, then discovers and enters a service hatch inside the wall to escape detection.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Rey abandons her initial plan to steal a TIE fighter directly and instead evades stormtroopers by climbing down a walkway and entering a service hatch in the wall.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to escape Starkiller Base by stealing a ship
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: hidden inside the wall infrastructure of Starkiller Base
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: still inside enemy territory with no clear path to extraction
evidence_quotes: But the problem: between her and the ship she wants to steal, is a GROUP OF STORMTROOPERS. Guards, in conversation.
we see, FAR BEHIND HER in the perpendicular hall, ANOTHER GROUP OF STORM- and SNOWTROOPERS headed her way!
She strenuously cross-climbs to an invisible SERVICE HATCH, which She opens, and climbs INSIDE THE WALL, closing the hatch behind her.

status_updates: transitioning from direct approach to concealed infiltration
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I saw the hatch just in time—no way out but through the walls

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Rey recovers, witnesses Finn's struggle against Kylo Ren, and instinctively calls Luke's lightsaber to her. She ignites it and launches a powerful attack, surprising Kylo with her raw skill.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: first use of Force in combat
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Rey instinctively calls Luke's lightsaber to her hand during a confrontation with Kylo Ren and ignites it, marking her first use of the weapon.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: defends against Kylo Ren
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: gains control of Luke's lightsaber and engages Kylo Ren in combat
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: source and limits of her Force ability
evidence_quotes: LUKE'S LIGHTSABER FINALLY FLIES OUT OF THE SNOW, BULLETS TOWARD KYLO REN -- -- AND SPEEDS PAST HIM!
SHE IGNITES LUKE'S LIGHTSABER FOR THE FIRST TIME, HER EYES BLAZING.
They BATTLE POWERFULLY -- He is clearly rocked by her raw, innate skill.

relation_updates: direct confrontation with Kylo Ren begins
auxiliary.persona_anchor: the lightsaber flew to me like it knew my hand

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Rey, mourning Finn as the planet collapses, sees the Millennium Falcon emerge from a canyon; Chewie pilots it, and its lights ignite hope in her.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Rey shifts from despair to hope upon seeing the Millennium Falcon arrive, piloted by Chewie.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: survival and escape
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: determined to survive
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Finn's survival uncertain
evidence_quotes: Rey falls to her knees near him, turns him over, sees his cauterized but possibly fatal wound.
REY Finn! Finn... Tears come to her eyes as she lifts him, holds his lifeless body in her arms.

relation_updates: emotional bond with Finn confirmed
reconnection with Chewbacca
auxiliary.persona_anchor: I held Finn, thinking he was gone—then I saw the Falcon light up the dark.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: The timeline traces 12 key developments across the character's screenplay trajectory.
